Patch Set 1:

not sure  why this is repeatedly failing review-ldiskfs-dne-arm sanity/415, but I can't see why the patch would be causing it.  It failed 6/130 on aarch64/master in the past week, 5/360 for x86 in the past 3 days, so I've resubmitted again.  also going to push a patch to see if this test can be improved, or if maybe it is actually pointing out a regression.

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1:
> 
> not sure  why this is repeatedly failing review-ldiskfs-dne-arm sanity/415, but I can't see why the patch would be causing it.  It failed 6/130 on aarch64/master in the past week, 5/360 for x86 in the past 3 days, so I've resubmitted again.  also going to push a patch to see if this test can be improved, or if maybe it is actually pointing out a regression.

Andreas, Thanks. 

On local setup, for rename it takes mostly 2-3 seconds (default max_rpc_in_flight which is 8) to finish for 500 (ldiskfs). When it fails it just bumps a little over 100. Last time it was 111s this time it is 102s. Your changes 100 to 120s (under LU-11170) should be fixing most of the sporadic timeouts seen.

Patch Set 1: Verified+1

commit.subject: LU-16492 tests: sanity/398b variable used without assignment
commit.message:
LU-16492 tests: sanity/398b variable used without assignment

This patch initilizes 'before' variable with UNIX
timestamp. Variable 'before' was used without assigning
any value.

Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=sanity env=ONLY=398b
Fixes: b4880f37582a ("LU-15483 tests: Improve test 398b")
Signed-off-by: Arshad Hussain <arshad.hussain@aeoncomputing.com>
Change-Id: Iba9e361735272d9c640a115f520ee7c60ac41239
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/49687
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Jian Yu <yujian@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
